scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n api,web,home,about,blog,proj,contact,links -c blue,green,cyan,magenta,yellow,red,white,gray "pnpm run dev:api" "pnpm run dev:web" "pnpm run dev:sub:home" "pnpm run dev:sub:about" "pnpm run dev:sub:blog" "pnpm run dev:sub:projects" "pnpm run dev:sub:contact" "pnpm run dev:sub:links"
scripts.install:all: pnpm install --dir nest-server && pnpm install --dir next-host && pnpm run install:subapps
scripts.install:subapps: pnpm install --dir qiankun-subapps/app-home && pnpm install --dir qiankun-subapps/app-about && pnpm install --dir qiankun-subapps/app-blog && pnpm install --dir qiankun-subapps/app-projects && pnpm install --dir qiankun-subapps/app-contact && pnpm install --dir qiankun-subapps/app-links
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm --dir nest-server exec prisma migrate dev --name init
scripts.build:subapps: pnpm run build:sub:home && pnpm run build:sub:about && pnpm run build:sub:blog && pnpm run build:sub:projects && pnpm run build:sub:contact && pnpm run build:sub:links
scripts.build:web: pnpm run build:subapps && pnpm --dir next-host run build
